title: The Legacy
content:
Years passed, and Yan Long became an old man. He had ruled the Yan Kingdom for decades, and he had brought peace and prosperity to the land.

His son, Yan Chen, had grown into a strong and wise prince, and he was ready to take over.

"Father," Yan Chen said, one day. "It's time for me to take over."

Yan Long nodded. "Yes. You are ready."

He stood up, his legs weak with age.

"People of the Yan Kingdom," Yan Long said, standing on the palace steps.

"I have ruled this kingdom for many years, and I have tried to do my best. But now, it is time for a new leader."

He looked at Yan Chen. "My son, Yan Chen, will be the new Emperor."

The crowd cheered, and Yan Chen stepped forward.

"I promise to rule with fairness and justice," Yan Chen said. "And I will protect this kingdom with my life."

***

After the ceremony, Yan Long and Lin Xue went to the palace gardens, where they had first met.

"Do you remember when we first met?" Lin Xue said, smiling.

Yan Long nodded. "Yes. You were feeding the birds, and I was walking through the garden."

Lin Xue smiled. "And now look at us. We're old, and we have a son who's about to become Emperor."

Yan Long nodded. "Time flies."

He took her hand. "But I'm glad I met you. You've made my life amazing."

Lin Xue smiled. "You've made my life amazing too."

***

That night, Yan Long had a dream. He was flying through the sky as a dragon, and he saw all the dragons and humans living together in peace.

He saw his son, Yan Chen, ruling the kingdom with wisdom and compassion.

And he saw the future, bright and full of hope.

Yan Long smiled. This was the legacy he had created, and he was proud of it.

***

The next morning, Yan Long passed away peacefully, surrounded by his family.

The kingdom mourned, but they also celebrated his life and his legacy.

"He was a great Emperor," one of the people said.

"And a great dragon," another said.

***

Years later, Yan Chen stood on the palace steps, looking at the kingdom.

"Father," Yan Chen said, speaking to the sky.

"I promise to continue your legacy, and I will make you proud."

He looked at his wife and children, and he knew that the future was bright.

The dragon prince's legacy would live on, and the world would be a better place because of him.

The end... for now.
